title: Control of Near 3I Shinji vs Eva Yui
display_title: Control of Near 3I Shinji vs Eva Yui
wikitext:
[]:             Quote Post by Stryker » Sat May 28, 2011 1:07 pm AuraTwilight wrote: Shinji is an asshole.

[]:             Quote Post by Tarnsman » Sat May 28, 2011 1:14 pm Stryker wrote: Yeah, but... wait a second. How did Shinji cheat Yui out of any screentime in 2.22?

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Sat May 28, 2011 3:29 pm Tarnsman wrote: Yui didn't get to eat Zeruel this time around. I guess that makes Shinji an asshole to Yui's fans.

[]:             Quote Post by Warren Peace » Sun May 29, 2011 4:18 am Legendary wrote: That's not how you spell Buddha.

[]:             Quote Post by illustriusCheese » Sun May 29, 2011 11:01 am Looked to me like Shinji was the God since he was in control, not Yui.

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Sun May 29, 2011 11:46 am Yui is kind of complicit in whatever Shinji did, though, since it's her body. And in the event that she wasn't complicit, that's kind of a genuinely horrifying action on Shinji's part.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun May 29, 2011 9:38 pm If Yui wouldn't be complicit, she could have shut down at any time (and/or at least wouldn't have waited for Shinji, as Gendo's line implied). So Shinji's actions could still fall in line with whatever her own plans are...at least we'll see with 3.0.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Mon May 30, 2011 2:44 pm I think it's funnier if his God Mode bullshit completely overrode her. "Well, okay, as long as I can nom Zeruel for my plan and-wait what are you doing? Shinji stop. What did you say? Shinji! Shinji DAMMIT LISTEN TO YOUR MOTHER! WHAT THE FUCK ARE YOU DOING YOU'LL RUIN EVERYTHING! Get that bitch out of my living space, it's bad enough you're in here! God dammit....well fine, as long as you're stuck here, keep it down, alright? You kids scream like banshees."

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Mon May 30, 2011 3:45 pm Well, Fuyu implied that "the plan" was made 14 years ago, so Yui might be 'in' on a few Details like, that they want Shinji to trigger God Mode via power of Love. She obviously couldn't have known who would fill the role of her potential daughter-in-law, tough...

[]:             Quote Post by Legendary » Mon May 30, 2011 4:03 pm That's the sickest thing I've ever heard. "Hey Fuyutsuki, I was thinking, instead of just getting my own S2 Engine, let's try to make sure things go badly enough that one or more fourteen year old girls die so that Shinji flips the fuck out and makes me a god anyway." "That's the best idea ever! ...I'm sycophantically in love with you. Can I touch your tits now? "

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Mon May 30, 2011 4:14 pm Maybe the plan said "Power of love" in general without further specifics... Or it just said "something related to an extreme emotional reaction of Shinji's" and Yui going berserk after Shin-chan's pleadings would still have been within the parameters... in any case, we'll find out next year or so

[]:             Quote Post by Warren Peace » Mon May 30, 2011 9:38 pm Azathoth wrote: And in the event that she wasn't complicit, that's kind of a genuinely horrifying action on Shinji's part.

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Mon May 30, 2011 9:50 pm Warren Peace wrote: How so? If anything, it would be a genuinely horrifying action on Gendo's part. Shinji doesn't know anything about Unit-01 (especially in Rebuild). To him, the Eva is just a machine.

[]:             Quote Post by Warren Peace » Mon May 30, 2011 9:53 pm Well, if it's horrifying, Shinji is oblivious to it being horrifying, at least. It would be like if you found out your car could think for itself.

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Mon May 30, 2011 10:05 pm I could make an entire movie about the things which are oblivious to Shinji. Unfortunately this Anno guy kind of beat me to the punch. I don't really feel like being nice to Shinji just because he's being stupid, though. He's heard people going on about Evas having "personality data" and he's well aware that they can act on their own without the pilot's input, surely he should at least be considering that there's something alive in there?

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Mon May 30, 2011 10:47 pm Azathoth wrote: I could make an entire movie about the things which are oblivious to Shinji. Unfortunately this Anno guy kind of beat me to the punch. I don't really feel like being nice to Shinji just because he's being stupid, though. He's heard people going on about Evas having "personality data" and he's well aware that they can act on their own without the pilot's input, surely he should at least be considering that there's something alive in there?

[]:             Quote Post by Warren Peace » Tue May 31, 2011 2:01 am Yeah, how could he possibly think it's smarter than an animal? The only time he's seen Unit-01 "conscious" is when it tore apart Sachiel like an orangutan.

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Tue May 31, 2011 8:20 am Kendrix wrote: He probably got the message that they're sort of alive by the time he saw the eye and found it too disturbing to think about.

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Tue May 31, 2011 8:31 am Azathoth wrote: He doesn't see the eye in Rebuild, as far as I remember.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Tue May 31, 2011 2:50 pm I still don't think Yui had any say in what happened in that scene, since I extremely doubt she was down with "KILL ALL HUMANITY" and had no way of knowing that Kaworu would make a saving throw (pun totally intended).
summary:
[]:             Quote Post by Stryker » Sat May 28, 2011 1:07 pm AuraTwilight wrote: Shinji is an asshole.

[]:             Quote Post by Tarnsman » Sat May 28, 2011 1:14 pm Stryker wrote: Yeah, but... wait a second. How did Shinji cheat Yui out of any screentime in 2.22?

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Sat May 28, 2011 3
